dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The carriage rumbled, a relentless rhythm against the desolate landscape. Each turn of the wheel brought me closer to my fate.

dialogue.speaker: Edith
dialogue.line: They call him the Monster of the North. Duke Kael, the man whose shadow is said to wither crops and freeze hearts.

dialogue.speaker: Edith
dialogue.line: And I, Edith de Valois, am to be his wife.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CARRIAGE RUMBLE (CONTINUOUS)

dialogue.speaker: Edith
dialogue.line: My family's ruin was swift and absolute. A single, ill-fated investment, and suddenly, the proud Valois name was synonymous with debt. My hand, once sought by many, became a mere commodity.

dialogue.speaker: Edith
dialogue.line: A desperate bargain to save what little remained. Marry the Duke, and our debts would be cleared. A simple transaction, devoid of love or hope.

dialogue.speaker: Edith
dialogue.line: But I am no fragile flower. I survived my family's downfall. I will survive this.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WIND HOWLS

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Hours bled into each other, the sun dipping below the horizon, painting the sky in bruised purples and grays. Finally, a colossal silhouette emerged from the gloom.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CARRIAGE SLOWS. CREAKING.

dialogue.speaker: Edith
dialogue.line: Blackwood Manor. Even from here, it exudes an oppressive aura. No lights, no welcoming warmth. Just stone and shadow.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GATES GROAN OPEN (LOUD, RUSTY)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The carriage passed through the towering gates, a final, definitive click echoing behind us as they sealed shut.

dialogue.speaker: Edith
dialogue.line: No turning back now.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CARRIAGE STOPS. HORSES WHINNY.

dialogue.speaker: Butler (gruff)
dialogue.line: Lady Edith. Welcome to Blackwood Manor.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A gaunt butler with eyes like chips of ice stood by the carriage door. His voice was devoid of any warmth, a stark contrast to the usual greetings a noble lady received.

dialogue.speaker: Edith
dialogue.line: Thank you, sir. I am Edith de Valois.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: EDITH STEPS DOWN. DRESS RUSTLES.

dialogue.speaker: Edith
dialogue.line: The air was biting, carrying the scent of damp earth and something else… something metallic and old. The manor loomed, a monstrous silhouette against the moonless sky.

dialogue.speaker: Butler
dialogue.line: His Grace awaits you in the main hall.

dialogue.speaker: Edith
dialogue.line: He wasted no time. Straight to the confrontation, then.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FOOTSTEPS ECHO (ON STONE)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The interior was as cold and unwelcoming as the exterior. Tapestries depicting forgotten battles lined the walls, and the only light came from a few flickering candelabras.

dialogue.speaker: Edith
dialogue.line: My heart hammered a frantic rhythm against my ribs. This wasn't just a marriage; it felt like walking into a lion's den.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: HEART THUMP (LOUD)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: At the far end of the vast hall, a figure sat on a high-backed chair, shrouded in shadow. Only the glint of his eyes, like predatory embers, pierced the gloom.

dialogue.speaker: Duke Kael
dialogue.line: So, you've arrived.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: His voice was deep, resonant, and carried an undeniable weight of authority. It sent a shiver down Edith's spine, but she met his gaze head-on.

dialogue.speaker: Edith
dialogue.line: Duke Kael. I am Edith de Valois. I assume you are His Grace?

dialogue.speaker: Duke Kael
dialogue.line: Indeed. And you are my future Duchess.

dialogue.speaker: Edith
dialogue.line: His eyes were like obsidian, sharp and unyielding. There was no warmth, no welcome, only a chilling intensity that seemed to strip away all pretense.

dialogue.speaker: Edith
dialogue.line: This man... he truly is the monster they speak of. But I won't break. I won't just survive here; I will find a way to live.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SILENCE (HEAVY)

dialogue.speaker: Edith
dialogue.line: A new chapter begins. And I, Edith, will write my own story.

summary: Edith de Valois arrives at the desolate Blackwood Manor, forced into an arranged marriage with the feared 'Monster of the North,' Duke Kael. Despite the chilling atmosphere and the Duke's intimidating presence, Edith resolves to survive and forge her own path.
